description: Synthetic batch-fix manifest for the Atlas SDK docs corpus.

items.problem: The setup flow needs an explicit success condition.
items.proposed_fix: Add a verification step that describes the expected session result.

items.problem: The reference should describe the return value for createSession().
items.proposed_fix: Add a Returns section that names the Session object.

items.problem: The authentication section should warn readers not to commit tokens.
items.proposed_fix: Add a short token-handling note under Missing Token.

items.problem: Page has no intro paragraph after the title, so agent-facing indexes cannot derive a description (flagged by the llms.txt validator).
items.proposed_fix: Add a one-sentence intro paragraph describing what the page covers.
